Last update: February 21, 2026

Welcome to Monarca Smart Travel. Please read these Terms and Conditions carefully before using our mobile application. By accessing or using the Application, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree with any part of them, you may not access the service.

1. Acceptance of Terms
The use of this application grants the status of User and implies full and unreserved acceptance of each and every provision included in this text. Monarca Smart Travel reserves the right to modify these terms at any time, informing users through the application.

2. Service Description
Monarca Smart Travel is an itinerary management and travel assistance platform that allows users to organize destinations, view dates, and manage logistics information. The service is provided "as is" and based on availability.

3. User Registration and Responsibility
Account: To access certain features, the user might need to create an account. The user is solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their password.

Veracity: The user agrees to provide real, up-to-date, and complete information during the registration process.

Minimum age: Use of the application is restricted to persons over 18 years of age or minors with legal consent from their guardians.

4. Intellectual Property
All application content (texts, graphics, logos, icons, images, source code, Jetpack Compose interface design, and software) are the exclusive property of Monarca Smart Travel or its licensors and are protected by international intellectual property laws. Reproduction, distribution, or transformation without express authorization is prohibited.

5. Privacy Policy and Data Protection
In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), provided personal data will be processed to manage your travel experience. The user has the right to access, rectify, and delete their data at any time through the application settings or by contacting our technical support.

6. Limitation of Liability
Monarca Smart Travel is not responsible for:

Errors in flight information or reservations provided by third parties.

Damages derived from improper use of the application.

Service interruptions due to technical maintenance or force majeure.

Data loss if the user does not maintain an adequate backup.

7. Prohibited Use
The user agrees not to:

Use the application for illegal purposes.

Attempt to decompile or reverse engineer the software.

Introduce viruses or malicious software that could damage the service infrastructure.

8. Third-Party Links
The application may contain links to third-party websites or services (such as maps, airlines, or hotels). We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of these third parties.

9. Conflict Resolution and Jurisdiction
These Terms shall be governed and interpreted in accordance with current legislation in Spain. For any controversy that may arise from the use of the application, the parties submit to the Courts and Tribunals of the city where the company's registered office is located, waiving any other jurisdiction that may correspond to them.

10. Contact
If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, you can contact us at:

Email: support@monarcasmarttravel.com

Web: www.monarcasmarttravel.com
Monarca Smart Travel is your ideal travel planning app. Organize your itinerary, track your budget, and discover new destinations easily and intelligently.
What adventure are we planning today?
